title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Oden as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I want to adventure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: out at sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Tale of Open Continues!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You cannot do that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just take me with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Weren't you just trying to kill the captain?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not the type of man that'd be content with being a follower.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know what happens when a bunch of folks like that band together...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The last crew I was a part of had that frustrating issue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just set sail on your own!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have attempted it dozens of times, but it is no use!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have zero talent when it comes to sailing and navigation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: White- Beard!! Leaving Wano happens to be a crime that carries a severe punishment, so....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we're on the same page, then!! That's good to know. I had no intention of taking him with me, anyway!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bump!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You did not need to tell him that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to go on this adventure, whether it is legal or not!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I want to see the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think there's only five islands in the whole world!? Hahaha!! Don't be ridiculous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you guessed 10 or 20 thousand, you'd still be way off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't you get it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The world is insanely vast-yoil!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where are you going, Lord open?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Two weeks later

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are countless islands out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just want to relieve myself in peace!! Stop hassling me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am a Daimyo, remember!? A Daimyo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...please go ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel bad for open, but our only option is to sneak off in the dead of night!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If strength was all that mattered, I'd have been happy to let him join our forces, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If I did accept his request...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rulers of the country would probably consider it a Royal kidnapping. Dealing with the consequences of that scenario would just be a pain.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The treasure they gave us has been stowed away, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They even gave us food and repair supplies...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I knew you were up to something!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: White- Beard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I KNEW YOU were up to something, Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I am going to stop you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Leaving this country is my dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please let me join you!! Please let me see the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must return with me!! You are the heir to the shoppingunate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What crazy bastards....!! Well, see ya around, open. Hopefully you'll float back to shore quietly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait, Marco!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Pull up the guy that's holding him back. And only that guy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the water- fall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAAAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time to be worrying about others!! Hold on to the ship!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
